XFreeSection

The XFreeSection function frees from memory the specified XBE image section.

BOOL XFreeSection(
  LPCSTR pSectionName
);

Parameters

pSectionName
[in] Pointer to a null-terminated string that specifies the name of the section to free.

Return Values

If the function succeeds, the return value is TRUE.

If the function fails, the return value is FALSE. To get extended error information, call GetLastError.

Remarks

The section must have previously been loaded with a call to XLoadSection or XLoadSectionByHandle.

If the function succeeds, it decrements the specified section's reference count by one. If the reference count is decremented to zero, the section is unloaded from memory.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xbox.h, for include use Xtl.h.
Import Library: Use Xapilib.lib

See Also

Executable File Functions | XLoadSection, XLoadSectionByHandle, XFreeSectionByHandle
